name: local-llm skill routes the issue-label filtering operation to local model when available
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/local-llm/route.sh" --operation issue-label-filtering --availability-stub available 2>out.txt && grep -q 'route=local-llm' out.txt && grep -q 'operation=issue-label-filtering' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
